name: Digital Artificial Insemination Gun (IB-G2)
shortDesc: Device that detects heat cycles and pregnancy in female cows, sheep, and goats, improving the success of artificial insemination.
fullDesc:
### About

This device can detect **heat cycles** and **pregnancy** in female cows, sheep, and goats, improving the success of artificial insemination.

### Development

Through a grant program in 2022, the second-generation **IB-Gun (IB-G2)** was developed with:

- High-resolution camera for accurate semen placement
- Onboard color LCD display
- Temperature sensor for reproductive health monitoring
specs: High-resolution camera for accurate semen placement
Temperature sensor for reproductive health monitoring

name: Alat Pengering Batik (Batik Dryer)
client: UMKM Sinar Abadi Batik Kulon Progo
shortDesc: Drying chamber for batik fabric using water heat converted to hot air, centrally integrated and automatically controlled.
fullDesc:
### About

The batik drying chamber is a specially designed room for drying batik fabric. It utilizes a system that converts **water heat into hot air**, which is then circulated inside the chamber.

### How It Works

- Average temperature reaches **42°C**
- Centrally integrated system
- Automatic temperature control

### Impact

This innovation provides a solution for **UMKM Sinar Abadi Batik**, allowing them to:

- Shorten drying time
- Maintain production stability
- Preserve the quality of the batik fabric
specs: Water heat to hot air conversion system

name: Smart Leveling
shortDesc: Robot utilizing inertia sensors and mecanum-driven wheels to detect and measure floor surface inclination.
fullDesc:
### About

Tim mahasiswa dari Sekolah Vokasi UGM berhasil menciptakan robot pintar pemindai dan pengukur kemiringan permukaan lantai dengan teknologi **sensor inersia** dan **mechanum-driven wheel** yang mampu bergerak secara **3-DOF** (Degree of Freedom).

### Function

Smart Leveling dapat digunakan untuk mempersingkat waktu pekerjaan pengecekan kerataan lantai keramik tanpa mengurangi kualitas pekerjaan sehingga mengurangi risiko terjadinya kerugian pemilik proyek maupun pelaksana proyek.

### Achievement

Robot canggih ini merupakan salah satu produk unggulan dari **Sekolah Vokasi UGM** yang diikutsertakan dalam kompetisi **Program Kreativitas Mahasiswa – Karya Inovatif (PKM-KI)** dan mendapat pendanaan riset dari Dirjen Kemendikbud Ristek RI.
specs: 3-DOF movement capability (translasi maju-mundur, geser kanan-kiri, diagonal)

name: Kandang Hewan Percobaan dengan Ventilasi Individu (IVC Cage)
shortDesc: Individually Ventilated Cage (IVC) - Sistem kandang khusus hewan laboratorium dengan ventilasi udara terpisah.
fullDesc:
### About

**Individually Ventilated Cage (IVC)** merupakan sistem pemeliharaan hewan laboratorium yang dilengkapi ventilasi udara terpisah pada setiap kandang.

### How It Works

- Udara bersih disuplai melalui **Air Handling Unit (AHU)**
- Disaring menggunakan **HEPA filter** sebelum didistribusikan ke masing-masing kandang

### Benefits

- Menjaga hewan tetap bebas dari kontaminasi mikroorganisme
- Mencegah infeksi silang antar kandang
- Memastikan kondisi lingkungan yang stabil
- Menghasilkan data penelitian yang akurat, konsisten, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan

### Application

IVC banyak digunakan pada fasilitas penelitian biomedis, farmasi, dan laboratorium yang memelihara hewan dengan standar **Specific Pathogen Free (SPF)**.
specs: Supply port dan exhaust port otomatis

name: Kandang Hewan Percobaan Filter Udara (IVC Rack System)
shortDesc: IVC Rack System - Sistem rak kandang hewan laboratorium dengan HEPA filter untuk udara bersih.
fullDesc:
### About

**Individually Ventilated Cage (IVC)** merupakan sistem kandang khusus untuk hewan laboratorium (tikus, mencit, hamster, dll.) yang setiap kandangnya memiliki aliran udara bersih sendiri, sehingga antar kandang tidak saling mencemari.

### HEPA Filtration

Berbeda dengan kandang biasa yang udara di dalam rak bercampur, pada IVC setiap kandang mendapatkan suplai udara yang telah disaring menggunakan **HEPA Filter**.

> HEPA mampu menyaring sekitar **99,97%** partikel berukuran 0,3 mikron, sehingga bakteri, spora jamur, debu, dan sebagian besar aerosol biologis tertahan.
specs: Rak IVC dengan manifold distribusi udara
Supply dan Exhaust HEPA Filter terpisah

resources.title: Sertifikat DI - Kandang Hewan Percobaan dengan Ventilasi Individu

name: SA-6 Mortar Dropper Tactical UAV
shortDesc: Development of a tactical multirotor UAV capable of carrying and deploying mortar payloads with high stability, precision, and mission readiness for defense applications.
fullDesc:
### About

The **SA-6 Mortar Dropper** is a tactical multirotor unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) developed by Frogs Indonesia to support modern military and defense operations. Designed and manufactured in Indonesia, the platform demonstrates the capability of domestic engineering in developing reliable aerial systems for reconnaissance, tactical logistics, and precision payload delivery in complex operational environments.

### Exhibition

The UAV was officially showcased during the **Indo Defence 2025 Expo & Forum**, one of Southeast Asia's largest international defense exhibitions held at JIExpo Kemayoran, Jakarta.

### Capabilities

- **Flight endurance:** approximately 15-25 minutes
- Suitable for short-range tactical missions: battlefield reconnaissance, border surveillance, target observation, and rapid response operations
- Operational flexibility in areas that are difficult or dangerous for ground personnel to access

### Payload

- **60 mm mortar deployment system** - carry and release up to four mortar rounds
- Capable of carrying up to **7 kg** of payload
- Enables logistics support, ammunition resupply, medical equipment delivery, and emergency supplies

### Navigation

The navigation system combines **GPS-based autonomous flight** capabilities with manual remote-control operation, providing operators with an intuitive and efficient user experience.

news.title: Frogs Indonesia Tampil di Indo Defence 2025
Drone Tempur Frogs Indonesia Tampil di Pameran Pertahanan Terbesar Asia Tenggara
7 Fakta Unik Drone SA-6 Mortar Dropper Buatan Indonesia

name: Smart Solar Finder (Prototipe)
fullDesc:
### About

Designed and developed a prototype **dual-axis solar tracking system** to demonstrate automatic photovoltaic (PV) panel positioning based on real-time sunlight detection.

### Hardware

- **Arduino Uno** microcontroller
- 4x **Light Dependent Resistor (LDR)** sensors
- 2x **servo motors** for horizontal (azimuth) and vertical (elevation) adjustment

### How It Works

The control algorithm compares light intensity from four directional sensors and dynamically drives both axes to minimize the difference in illumination, allowing the solar panel to maintain an optimal orientation relative to the sun.

### Project Scope

- Electronic circuit design
- Embedded software development
- Mechanical assembly
- Sensor calibration and system testing

### Scalability

Although developed as a proof-of-concept prototype, the system architecture is highly scalable. The same tracking principle can be implemented on larger solar installations by replacing hobby servo motors with industrial actuators, stepper motors, or geared DC motors.

### Key Responsibilities

- Designed the mechanical structure for dual-axis motion
- Developed embedded firmware using Arduino (C/C++)
- Designed and assembled the electronic control system
- Implemented real-time solar tracking algorithms using four LDR sensors
- Performed sensor calibration and servo tuning
- Built and tested a functional prototype for performance validation

name: Automatic Wood Drying Oven Control System
client: local wood craftsmen in Pandeglang, Banten, Indonesia
shortDesc: Field Implementation – Community-Based Wood Drying Automation
fullDesc:
### About

Designed and implemented an automated control system for a wood drying oven as part of a community engineering project for local wood craftsmen in **Pandeglang, Banten, Indonesia**.

### Objective

- Improve drying efficiency
- Reduce manual operation
- Maintain consistent drying temperatures for higher-quality wood processing

### Control System

The system integrates a **digital thermostat (STC-1000)** with a relay-based electrical panel to automatically regulate the heating process.

- **Temperature sensor** continuously monitors the drying chamber
- **Gas burner** controlled through an electric solenoid valve
- **SCR speed controller** optimizes airflow and heat distribution
- **DC-powered ignition module** provides reliable automatic burner ignition

### Features

- Configurable maximum drying temperature and hysteresis
- Stable and energy-efficient operation with minimal user intervention

### Key Responsibilities

- Designed the electrical control system and wiring architecture
- Configured automatic temperature control using a digital thermostat
- Integrated gas burner automation with an electric solenoid valve
- Implemented variable-speed blower control using an SCR controller
- Installed and tested the complete control system on-site
- Commissioned the system for daily use by local wood craftsmen

### Technologies

`STC-1000 Digital Thermostat` `Relay-Based Control Panel` `Gas Solenoid Valve` `SCR AC Motor Speed Controller` `DC Ignition Module` `220 VAC Electrical Distribution`

### Impact

The automated wood drying oven has been successfully deployed and operated by local wood craftsmen in Pandeglang, Banten. The system improves temperature stability, reduces manual supervision, enhances drying consistency, and increases operational efficiency compared to conventional manual drying.
specs: The system was developed to improve drying efficiency
and maintain consistent drying temperatures for higher-quality wood processing
A temperature sensor continuously monitors the drying chamber
controls the gas burner through an electric solenoid valve
Configured automatic temperature control using a digital thermostat
Integrated gas burner automation with an electric solenoid valve
Implemented variable-speed blower control using an SCR controller

name: Smart NPK Analyzer
fullDesc:
### About

The **Smart NPK Analyzer Prototype** is a research and development project owned by the Faculty of Agricultural Technology (FTP), Universitas Gadjah Mada (UGM). The system is designed to provide rapid digital measurement of the primary soil nutrients - **Nitrogen (N)**, **Phosphorus (P)**, and **Potassium (K)** - through an integrated desktop instrument.

### Working Principle

1. The operator places the prepared sample into the measurement chamber
2. Initiates the analysis through the **touchscreen interface**
3. The instrument performs an automated measurement sequence
4. The embedded control system processes sensor data to obtain N, P, K values
5. Results are displayed in real time on the touchscreen
6. Results can be printed immediately using the integrated **thermal printer**

The system also provides a preliminary interpretation of the measurement results, allowing users to quickly assess the nutrient condition of the tested sample.

### My Contribution

- Mechanical enclosure design and assembly support
- Embedded firmware development
- Sensor communication integration
- Touchscreen HMI implementation
- Thermal printer integration
- Electronic system integration
- Prototype assembly, testing, and functional validation

### Technologies

`Embedded Systems` `ESP32 Firmware Development` `RS485 Communication` `HMI` `Thermal Printing` `Electronics Integration` `Prototype Development`

### Status

This instrument is currently in the **Research & Development (R&D)** stage. The prototype has been validated for laboratory-scale testing and is being prepared for field trials.
specs: Sensor, HMI, embedded controller, and printer integrated into a single desktop unit
Compact desktop enclosure with modular internal architecture
Rapid digital measurement of Nitrogen (N), Phosphorus (P), and Potassium (K)
Easy operation with minimal user interaction
